context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from this iteration are fixed and verified. Bug 1: custom_fields and model_extra are properly merged at top level of order documents when created via POST /api/orders. Bug 2: Group-by-date dropdown dynamically shows all columns with type='date' plus 'created_at'. Bug 3: Filter bar now includes date-type columns as filter options, and filter logic compares formatted dates using toLocaleDateString(). Database may have some test orders that were cleaned up.
